ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., St. Ansgar) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code or identifier for the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., city, county, state) */,
  "geographic_area" REAL /* Geographic area of the region (e.g., square kilometers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "year_code" TEXT /* Unique code or identifier for the year */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the year */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of age distribution (e.g., 0-18, 19-35, 36-60, 61+) */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of gender distribution (e.g., male, female, non-binary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_rates" (
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty rate record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate as a percentage */,
  "poverty_threshold" INTEGER /* The income threshold used to define poverty */,
  "poverty_population" INTEGER /* The number of people living below the poverty line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renter_occupancy" (
  "renter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renter occupancy record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "pct_renter_occupied" REAL /* Percentage of renter-occupied households */,
  "renter_occupied_households" INTEGER /* Number of renter-occupied households */,
  "renter_income_distribution" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of income distribution among renter-occupied households */,
  "renter_age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of age distribution among renter-occupied households */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renter_occupancy_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renter_occupancy_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "median_gross_rent" (
  "rent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each median gross rent record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "median_gross_rent" INTEGER /* Median gross rent in dollars */,
  "rent_distribution" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of rent distribution (e.g., quartiles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_gross_rent_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_gross_rent_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "median_household_income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each median household income record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income in dollars */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of income distribution (e.g., quartiles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_household_income_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_household_income_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "median_property_value" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each median property value record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "median_property_value" INTEGER /* Median property value in dollars */,
  "property_type_distribution" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of property type distribution (e.g., single-family, multi-family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_property_value_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_property_value_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rent_burden" (
  "burden_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rent burden record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "rent_burden" REAL /* Rent burden as a percentage */,
  "burden_distribution" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of rent burden distribution (e.g., quartiles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("burden_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rent_burden_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rent_burden_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racial_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial demographic record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "pct_white" REAL /* Percentage of white population */,
  "pct_af_am" REAL /* Percentage of African American population */,
  "pct_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic population */,
  "pct_am_ind" REAL /* Percentage of American Indian population */,
  "pct_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian population */,
  "pct_nh_pi" REAL /* Percentage of Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander population */,
  "other_races" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data for other racial categories (e.g., two or more races, other) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racial_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racial_demographics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eviction_filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eviction filing record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "eviction_filings" INTEGER /* Number of eviction filings */,
  "eviction_filing_rate" REAL /* Eviction filing rate as a percentage */,
  "filing_reasons" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of common reasons for eviction filings */,
  "filing_outcomes" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of outcomes of eviction filings (e.g., dismissed, evicted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eviction_filings_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eviction_filings_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evictions" (
  "eviction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eviction record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "evictions" INTEGER /* Number of actual evictions */,
  "eviction_rate" REAL /* Eviction rate as a percentage */,
  "eviction_reasons" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of common reasons for evictions */,
  "eviction_outcomes" TEXT /* JSON or serialized data of outcomes of evictions (e.g., voluntary move, forced eviction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eviction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evictions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evictions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level or permission level for the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
